headline: How lululemon’s Board Truce With Founder Chip Wilson Will Impact lululemon athletica (LULU) Investors
summary: In late May 2026, lululemon athletica inc. and founder Dennis “Chip” Wilson reached a Cooperation Agreement that ends their proxy dispute, adds two of Wilson’s nominees to the board after the 2026 annual meeting, commits to a third independent director with apparel expertise by October 1, 2026, and backs Wilson’s proposal to declassify the board. This agreement reduces governance friction ahead of the incoming CEO transition and could allow management and the refreshed board to refocus on...
